name: tiktok-analytics-map
description: Map TikTok Analytics/pixel evidence from HTML and/or Network dumps

steps.text: Skill: tiktok-analytics. Method: knowledge/privacy/tiktok-analytics.md. Example: wgtn-ac-nz-hosts.md (analytics.tiktok.com).

steps.prompt: Using skill tiktok-analytics and knowledge/privacy/tiktok-analytics.md (plus wgtn-ac-nz-hosts.md if relevant), produce map-tiktok: (1) verdict LOAD/CONFIG/BUNDLE/not found (2) HTML scan patterns (ttq, analytics.tiktok.com, _ttp) (3) Network evidence table if headers provided (4) redaction rules (5) policy-tension questions (6) gaps. Not legal advice. Do not invent pixel IDs.
